author: doll-agent
content:
Done. split() returned Vec<Vec<String>>, breaking the convention used by every other ferray-strings function (StringArray<D> or Array<X, D>).

Switched split() to return StringArray<Ix2> of shape (n_inputs, max_parts), padding rows shorter than max_parts with empty strings. Added split_ragged() returning Vec<Vec<String>> for callers that need to preserve per-element variable length.

Updated lib.rs re-exports, AC4 test, property_tests roundtrip. 2 new tests covering padding and ragged-form preservation.

ferray-strings: 140 lib tests + 12 property tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 700a3c64.
